assessment.note: Retreating into direct delivery when conversations get political signals a strong growth blocker and a mild clarity/alignment gap around how to operate through influence.

new_queue.label: Political conversations
new_queue.name: Political conversations — what makes those moments hardest for you to stay in?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific dynamic that makes Ahmed retreat from influence into execution.

new_queue.label: Stretch now
new_queue.name: Which part of your current work is actually stretching you right now?
new_queue.description: Distinguishes comfort-zone execution from genuine growth moments.

new_queue.label: Scope definition
new_queue.name: When you think about the next-level Head of Product role, what does good actually look like to you?
new_queue.description: Surfaces Ahmed's own definition of senior scope and whether it is framed strategically or tactically.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Influence target
new_queue.name: Which stakeholder forum matters most for your influence at this level?
new_queue.description: Identifies where Ahmed believes visibility and trust are won, rather than asking generally about stakeholders.

new_queue.label: Tradeoff ask
new_queue.name: What would you stop doing if you wanted to spend more time on strategic ownership?
new_queue.description: Forces a real tradeoff between tactical delivery and senior-level work, making the cost of change explicit.

new_queue.label: Manager leverage
new_queue.name: What should I be doing more of to help you build that scope?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the manager's role in increasing Ahmed's strategic reach without turning the conversation into generic support.

new_queue.label: First move
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to start first?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation into one concrete choice Ahmed will make before the next check-in.
